case_title: TWO SISTERS INC. DBA MARK HARRINGTON GLASSWARE VS MONROE, RENEE

docket_entries.description: PLTF DECL:TO CHANGE DEF'S PO BOX NO.
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF OCT-03-1994, NO APPEARANCE, ORDER OF ARREST TO ISSUE, BAIL $500.00, AS TO THIRD PARTY RENEE MONROE-BRIDAL MEDIA GROUP
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TWO SISTERS INC. DBA MARK HARRINGTON GLASSWARE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MONROE, RENEE $625.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $645.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
